calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long, CSR# 8620. (212)

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Jan-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Raquel Fox, Esq. for Petitioner: Irma Valdez, present as Guardian ad litem for: Anycia Sanchez, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $23,000.00
Medical Expenses $1,280.00
A net balance of $45,720.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual Bank, 2900 Mission St., San Francisco, CA. 94110, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
